name: convertTimestamp, convertTimestampNS
title: convertTimestamp, convertTimestampNS
syntax: void convertTimestamp(dword timestamp, dword& days, byte& hours, byte& minutes, byte& seconds, word& milliSeconds, word& microSeconds); // form 1
description: Converts a time stamp to separate parts
(form 1: maximum time: .2^32 * 10 microseconds = 11 hours, 55 minutes, 49 seconds, 672 milliseconds, 96 microseconds).

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: time stamp in 10 microseconds (form 1) time stamp in nanoseconds (form 2)
